name: way-stack
description: Three-command Claude Code stack replicator: master orchestrator, PARA + Karpathy vault, SDD agent factory, session hooks, auto-install of 6 upstream plugins, 7 design skills, and 3 optional frameworks (GSD, BMAD, gstack).

plugins.name: way-stack
plugins.description: Meta-plugin that bootstraps a full Claude Code dev stack in two commands. Orchestrator, vault, SDD flow, hooks, upstream deps.
